title: Garlicky Korean Garlic Stir-Fry
description: A savory and crisp hangover-cure dish featuring semi-skimmed milk blanched to add a unique creamy texture to this crispy stir-fry.

ingredients.name: 1 cup semi-skimmed milk, blanched and drained
2 cups mixed vegetables (e.g., bell peppers, mushrooms, onions)
1 teaspoon honey or sugar for sweetness

instructions: Heat a wok or large frying pan over medium-high heat. Add the blanched semi-skimmed milk and stir-fry until it turns golden brown.
Add minced garlic to the hot pan, stirring continuously for about 1 minute.
Add the mixed vegetables and soy sauce, mixing well with the garlic. Cook for another 5 minutes or until the vegetables are crisp-tender.
Taste the dish and adjust seasoning if needed by adding more honey or sugar to taste.
Drizzle sesame oil over the stir-fry to enhance its flavor and serve.
